features.name: std::randomize with inline constraint block
features.description: Code should include a std::randomize() call with a with{} constraint block specifying inline constraints
features.snippet:
class C; rand int x; endclass
std::randomize(x) with { x inside {[1:10]}; };

features.name: std::randomize with class member and constraint block
features.description: Code should include a std::randomize() call with a class member variable and a with{} constraint block
